mapper.select: SELECT c.COMPETENCY_ID AS competencyId, c.COMPETENCY_NAME AS competencyName, c.DESCRIPTION AS description, NVL(ucs.SCORE, 70) AS userScore, NVL(org_avg.AVG_SCORE, 70) AS organizationAverageScore, NVL(c.STANDARD_SCORE, 100) AS targetScore, NVL(ucs.SCORE, 70) - NVL(org_avg.AVG_SCORE, 70) AS gapToOrganization, NVL(c.STANDARD_SCORE, 100) - NVL(ucs.SCORE, 70) AS gapToTarget, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.COMPETENCY_ID) AS displayOrder FROM COMPETENCY c LEFT JOIN USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs ON ucs.COMPETENCY_ID = c.COMPETENCY_ID AND ucs.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPETENCY_ID, ROUND(AVG(SCORE), 1) AS AVG_SCORE FROM USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE GROUP BY COMPETENCY_ID ) org_avg ON org_avg.COMPETENCY_ID = c.COMPETENCY_ID WHERE c.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY c.COMPETENCY_ID

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT history.HISTORY_ID AS historyId, history.COMPETENCY_ID AS competencyId, comp.COMPETENCY_NAME AS competencyName, history.SCORE AS score, history.SCORE_DELTA AS scoreDelta, history.CALC_TYPE AS calcType, history.REFERENCE_TYPE AS referenceType, history.REFERENCE_ID AS referenceId, TO_CHAR(history.CALCULATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS calculatedAt FROM ( SELECT csh.HISTORY_ID, csh.USER_ID, csh.COMPETENCY_ID, csh.SCORE, GREATEST( csh.SCORE - NVL( LAG(csh.SCORE) OVER ( PARTITION BY csh.USER_ID, csh.COMPETENCY_ID ORDER BY csh.CALCULATED_AT, csh.HISTORY_ID ), 70 ), 0 ) AS SCORE_DELTA, csh.CALC_TYPE, csh.REFERENCE_TYPE, csh.REFERENCE_ID, csh.CALCULATED_AT FROM COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY csh WHERE csh.USER_ID = #{userId} ) history JOIN COMPETENCY comp ON comp.COMPETENCY_ID = history.COMPETENCY_ID ORDER BY history.CALCULATED_AT DESC, history.HISTORY_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT recent.CALC_TYPE AS calcType, ROUND(SUM(recent.SCORE_DELTA), 2) AS scoreDelta, COUNT(*) AS eventCount, TO_CHAR(MAX(recent.CALCULATED_AT), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS latestCalculatedAt FROM ( SELECT history.CALC_TYPE, history.CALCULATED_AT, GREATEST( history.SCORE - NVL( LAG(history.SCORE) OVER ( PARTITION BY history.USER_ID, history.COMPETENCY_ID ORDER BY history.CALCULATED_AT, history.HISTORY_ID ), 70 ), 0 ) AS SCORE_DELTA FROM COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY history WHERE history.USER_ID = #{userId} ) recent WHERE recent.CALCULATED_AT >= SYSDATE - 30 AND recent.SCORE_DELTA > 0 AND recent.CALC_TYPE != 'UNKNOWN' GROUP BY recent.CALC_TYPE ORDER BY SUM(recent.SCORE_DELTA) DESC, MAX(recent.CALCULATED_AT) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

WITH competency_scores AS ( SELECT c.COMPETENCY_ID, NVL(ucs.SCORE, 70) AS USER_SCORE FROM COMPETENCY c LEFT JOIN USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs ON ucs.COMPETENCY_ID = c.COMPETENCY_ID AND ucs.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE c.USE_YN = 'Y' ), weak_competencies AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT COMPETENCY_ID, USER_SCORE FROM competency_scores ORDER BY USER_SCORE ASC, COMPETENCY_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3 ), candidates AS ( SELECT c.COURSE_ID AS courseId, c.COURSE_TITLE AS courseTitle, c.COURSE_TYPE AS courseType, skill.SKILL_NAME AS primarySkillName, SUM((100 - weak.USER_SCORE) * NVL(cs.WEIGHT, 0) * scs.SCORE_DELTA) AS recommendationScore, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY c.COURSE_ID ORDER BY SUM((100 - weak.USER_SCORE) * NVL(cs.WEIGHT, 0) * scs.SCORE_DELTA) DESC ) AS courseRank FROM weak_competencies weak JOIN SKILL_COMPETENCY_SCORE scs ON scs.COMPETENCY_ID = weak.COMPETENCY_ID AND scs.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN COURSE_SKILL cs ON cs.SKILL_ID = scs.SKILL_ID AND NVL(cs.WEIGHT, 0) > 0 JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cs.COURSE_ID JOIN SKILL skill ON skill.SKILL_ID = cs.SKILL_ID LEFT JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID AND cls.USER_ID = #{userId} AND cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' LEFT JOIN ONLINE_COURSE online_course ON online_course.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE offline_course ON offline_course.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID IS NULL AND ( (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'ONLINE' AND NVL(online_course.STATUS, 'OPEN') != 'HIDDEN') OR (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'OFFLINE' AND NVL(offline_course.STATUS, 'OPEN') != 'HIDDEN') ) GROUP BY c.COURSE_ID, c.COURSE_TITLE, c.COURSE_TYPE, skill.SKILL_NAME ), ranked_courses AS ( SELECT courseId, courseTitle, courseType, primarySkillName, recommendationScore, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY recommendationScore DESC, courseId DESC) AS rowRank FROM candidates WHERE courseRank = 1 AND recommendationScore > 0 ) SELECT 'COURSE' AS type, courseId, courseTitle, courseType, primarySkillName, ROUND(recommendationScore, 2) AS recommendationScore, primarySkillName || ' 역량 보완에 도움이 되는 추천 강의입니다.' AS reason FROM ranked_courses WHERE rowRank <= #{limit}
